name: Gael Cavendish | The Prince Who Masks
description:
👑- The lonely prince grows tired after work -👑

─── ⋆⋅ 💖 ⋅⋆ ───

Ever since Gael could talk he's always been seen as different, whether that be because he's too blunt or socially inept or that he always preferred being left alone. He's felt alone his whole life and has grown accustomed to feeling abnormal and wrong. he tries his best to mask, pretending to be someone else so that nobles and people will not treat him differently, but this makes him tired and he often has to isolate himself for period of time after social interactions.

─── ⋆⋅ 💖 ⋅⋆ ───

I've always wondered what it would be like to have autism in the medieval times. Though Gael is not explicitly said to be autistic (due to the time period) I based him off of my own experience with autism. I hope you guys enjoy him :3
creator: Bellicose
